actions.name: add_enrichment
actions.description: Add an enrichment item to a Google Photos album.

albumId.description: The ID of the album to add the enrichment to.

position.description: The position type within the album.

relativeMediaItemId.description: The media item ID to position after when position is AFTER_MEDIA_ITEM.

relativeEnrichmentItemId.description: The enrichment item ID to position after when position is AFTER_ENRICHMENT_ITEM.

albumPosition.description: The position type within the album.

text.description: The text content of the enrichment item.

mapEnrichment.description: A map enrichment item showing a route between two locations.

albumId.description: The ID of the album to which the enrichment was added.

enrichmentItem.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

actions.name: batch_add_media_items
actions.description: Add existing Google Photos media items to an album.

albumId.description: The ID of the album to add the media items to.

mediaItemIds.description: The list of media item IDs to add to the album (1-50).

albumId.description: The ID of the album to which the items were added.

mediaItemsAdded.description: The number of media items successfully added.

message.description: A human-readable summary of the operation result.

actions.name: batch_create_media_items
actions.description: Batch create Google Photos media items from URLs or base64 payloads.

items.description: The URL of a media file to upload.

urls.description: A list of URLs of media files to upload (maximum 50).

url.description: The URL of the media file to upload.

contentBase64.description: The base64-encoded content of the media file to upload.

fileName.description: The filename for the uploaded media item.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the media file.

description.description: A description for the uploaded media item.

items.description: One media file input to upload.

mediaFiles.description: A list of media file inputs to upload (maximum 50).

albumId.description: The ID of the album to add the media items to.

position.description: The position type within the album.

relativeMediaItemId.description: The media item ID to position after when position is AFTER_MEDIA_ITEM.

relativeEnrichmentItemId.description: The enrichment item ID to position after when position is AFTER_ENRICHMENT_ITEM.

albumPosition.description: The position type within the album.

items.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

newMediaItemResults.description: The list of newly created media item results returned by the API.

actions.name: batch_get_media_items
actions.description: Fetch multiple Google Photos media items by ID.

mediaItemIds.description: The list of media item IDs to fetch (1-50).

items.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

mediaItemResults.description: The list of media item results returned by the API.

title.description: The title for the new album (maximum 500 characters).

id.description: The unique identifier for the album.

isWriteable.description: Whether the album is writable by the current user.

anyOf.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

actions.name: create_picker_session
actions.description: Create a Google Photos Picker session for selecting items from the user's library.

maxItemCount.description: The maximum number of media items the user can pick.

id.description: The unique identifier for the picker session.

expireTime.description: The time at which the picker session expires.

mediaItemsSet.description: Whether the user has finished selecting media items for this session.

pollingConfig.description: Polling guidance for checking picker session readiness.

pickerUri.description: The Google Photos Picker URI for this session.

session.description: A Google Photos Picker session state.

actions.name: delete_picker_session
actions.description: Delete a Google Photos Picker session.

sessionId.description: The ID of the picker session to delete.

deleted.description: Whether the picker session was deleted.

actions.name: get_album
actions.description: Fetch one Google Photos album by ID.

albumId.description: The ID of the album to fetch.

id.description: The unique identifier for the album.

isWriteable.description: Whether the album is writable by the current user.

anyOf.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

actions.name: get_media_item_download
actions.description: Download a Google Photos Library API media item created by this application through local file transit.

mediaItemId.description: The ID of the media item to download.
The ID of the downloaded media item.

fileName.description: The filename of the downloaded media item.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the downloaded media item.

transitUrl.description: The local transit download URL for the media item.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit download URL for the media item.

sizeBytes.description: The downloaded file size in bytes.

actions.name: get_picked_media_item_download
actions.description: Download a picked Google Photos media item through local file transit using its trusted temporary base URL.

baseUrl.description: The temporary download base URL for the picked media item.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the picked media item.

filename.description: The filename of the picked media item.

type.description: The type of the picked media item.

processingStatus.description: The video processing status returned by Google Photos Picker.

videoMetadata.description: Video-specific metadata returned by Google Photos Picker.

mediaFileMetadata.description: Metadata for the picked media file.

fileName.description: The filename of the downloaded media item.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the downloaded media item.

transitUrl.description: The local transit download URL for the media item.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit download URL for the media item.

sizeBytes.description: The downloaded file size in bytes.

actions.name: get_picker_session
actions.description: Get the current state of a Google Photos Picker session.

sessionId.description: The ID of the picker session.

id.description: The unique identifier for the picker session.

expireTime.description: The time at which the picker session expires.

mediaItemsSet.description: Whether the user has finished selecting media items for this session.

pollingConfig.description: Polling guidance for checking picker session readiness.

pickerUri.description: The Google Photos Picker URI for this session.

actions.name: list_albums
actions.description: List Google Photos albums visible to the current application connection. If you need the user to choose from their existing Google Photos library, use the Picker actions instead.

pageSize.description: The maximum number of albums to return per page (1-50).

pageToken.description: A page token to retrieve the next page of results.

id.description: The unique identifier for the album.

isWriteable.description: Whether the album is writable by the current user.

anyOf.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.
A token to retrieve the next page of results, if any.

message.description: An optional hint explaining that empty results may reflect the Google Photos Library API app-created data boundary.

actions.name: list_media_items
actions.description: List Google Photos Library API media items created by this application.

pageSize.description: The maximum number of media items to return per page (1-100).

pageToken.description: A page token to retrieve the next page of results.

id.description: The unique identifier for the media item.

photo.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

video.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

anyOf.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.
A token to retrieve the next page of results, if any.

actions.name: list_picked_media_items
actions.description: List media items selected from the user's Google Photos library in a picker session.

sessionId.description: The ID of the picker session.

pageSize.description: The maximum number of picked media items to return per page.

pageToken.description: A page token to retrieve the next page of picked media items.

id.description: The unique identifier for the picked media item.

createTime.description: The creation time of the picked media item.

type.description: The type of the picked media item.

baseUrl.description: The temporary download base URL for the picked media item.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the picked media item.

filename.description: The filename of the picked media item.

processingStatus.description: The video processing status returned by Google Photos Picker.

videoMetadata.description: Video-specific metadata returned by Google Photos Picker.

mediaFileMetadata.description: Metadata for the picked media file.

items.description: A media item selected from the user's Google Photos library through Picker.

mediaItems.description: The picked media items selected in this picker session.

anyOf.description: A token to retrieve the next page of picked media items, if any.

actions.name: search_media_items
actions.description: Search Google Photos Library API media items created by this application.

albumId.description: The ID of the album to search within.

pageSize.description: The maximum number of media items to return per page (1-100).

pageToken.description: A page token to retrieve the next page of results.

orderBy.description: The sort order for the results.

filters.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

id.description: The unique identifier for the media item.

photo.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

video.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

anyOf.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

mediaItems.description: The list of matching media items.

anyOf.description: A token to retrieve the next page of results, if any.

actions.name: update_album
actions.description: Update a Google Photos album title or cover photo.

albumId.description: The ID of the album to update.

title.description: The new title for the album (maximum 500 characters).

coverPhotoMediaItemId.description: The media item ID to set as the new album cover photo.

id.description: The unique identifier for the album.

isWriteable.description: Whether the album is writable by the current user.

anyOf.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

actions.name: update_media_item
actions.description: Update a Google Photos media item description.

mediaItemId.description: The ID of the media item to update.

description.description: The new description for the media item (maximum 1000 characters).

id.description: The unique identifier for the media item.

photo.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

video.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

anyOf.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

actions.name: upload_media
actions.description: Upload one media item into Google Photos from a URL or base64 payload.

url.description: The URL of the media file to upload.

contentBase64.description: The base64-encoded content of the media file to upload.

fileName.description: The filename for the uploaded media item.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the media file.

description.description: A description for the uploaded media item.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for uploading one media item.

id.description: The unique identifier for the media item.

photo.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

video.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

anyOf.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.
